pkgmetadata.longdescription: Psycopg 3 PostgreSQL database adapter for Python - Connection PoolThis distribution contains the optional connection pool packagepsycopg_pool__... __ httpswww.psycopg.orgpsycopg3docsadvancedpool.htmlThis package is kept separate from the main psycopg package because it islikely that it will follow a different release cycle.You can also install this package using pip install psycopg[pool]Please read the project readme__ and the installation documentation__ formore details... __ httpsgithub.compsycopgpsycopgreadme.. __ httpswww.psycopg.orgpsycopg3docsbasicinstall.html installing-the-connection-poolCopyright (C) 2020 The Psycopg Team
